title: Monday.com stopped creating rows for new data from Zapier

posts.author: seattle0099 (Wayne Dong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

From the last weekend, we realised that some data from Zapier is missing in our Monday.com spreadsheet.

From today, Monday.com spreadsheet stopped creating new row for any data from Zapier, when all Zap runs’ history showed sucess status?

Can anyone from dev team of Monday.com look into this problem?
